title: Russian Chicken Kebabs
description: Grilled Russian-style chicken kebabs with a pungent flavor, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Pungent sauce (see notes)
ingredients.notes: Mix together 1/4 cup mayonnaise, 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard, 1 tablespoon chopped fresh dill, and 1 minced garlic clove.

ingredients.name: Fried onions (see notes)
ingredients.notes: Fry 1/2 cup sliced onions in 1 tablespoon olive oil until golden brown.

instructions: Cut chicken into 1 1/2-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
In a small bowl, mix together pungent sauce ingredients.
Brush chicken with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill chicken for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
Brush chicken with pungent sauce during last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve chicken hot, garnished with fried onions and chopped parsley if desired.
